title: MejaRizon 12V 3A Power Supply Adapter, 5.5mm x 2.1mm Openreach Power Cable, AC/DC Adapter 100-240V 50/60Hz with 1.3 M Cable for LED Strips/Security Camera Monitor/Wireless Routers/WIFI IP/Audio

amazon_product_details_section.Best Sellers Rank: 36,238 in Electronics & Photo (See Top 100 in Electronics & Photo) 531 in AC Adapters

features: 【AC to DC 12V 3A】This 12V 3A power supply adapter adopts quality fire shell materal and built in software under voltage and over-voltage protection. AC Input: 100V-240V 60Hz/50Hz; Cable line 1.5 metres, DC Polarity: Center Positive, Outer Negative ;DC Output: 12V 3A 36W. Plug Size: 5.5mm*2.1mm

【AC/DC Power Adapter】AC adapter 100-240v 50 60hz, DC Output: 12V 3A (3000mA) 36W. Only electronic devices with 12V power supply while current less than 3A are supported, such as 300mA, 500mA, 1000mA, 1.2A, 1.5A, 1.6A, 1.8A, 2A. If your device draws 1.8A then 1.8A will be supplied. In order to avoid damage your devices, Please confirm that your device is compatible before purchasing

【Voltage Consistency】MejaRizon 12V dc power supply, operating within 100 - 240V and 50/60Hz, ensures a stable power supply. There are no voltage fluctuations during power - on, transmit, receive, or power - off phases. This safeguards your electronic products from potential destruction caused by unstable voltages. When plugged in, there is no spark, and it runs quietly without overheating. You don't have to worry about the risks of fires, explosions, or electric shocks

【Safe & Stable】MejaRizon 12 volt power supply is UKCA certified and has passed RoHS EMC approval. It comes with multiple built-in protections to ensure safe and stable charging for your device. These protections include over-current protection, which guards against excessive current flow; preventing overheating, over-temperature protection; over-voltage protection, safeguarding from high voltage; short-circuit protection, cutting off power in case of a short circuit. With all these features, it effectively shields your device during the charging process, giving you peace of mind

【Wide Applications】12V 3A openreach power cable is in high demand for audio amp boards, portable powered speakers, cable boxes, LCD monitor, wireless routers, 3D printers, computer projects, CCTV cameras, DC motors, HUB, Switches, audio/ video power supply, and Arduino controllers to provide a safe and stable power supply for your creation
description: 12V 3A AC/DC Power Adapter Kit Professional power solution for 12V-driven electronics Ideal for home users, DIY enthusiasts & security engineers Multi-scenario compatibility with routers, CCTV, LED strips Why Us? 1. 12v 3A power supply compatibility: Safely supports 12V/3A devices while delivering 3A current for higher demands. 2. AC adapter smart protection: Triple safeguards (over-voltage/overheat/short-circuit) prevent equipment damage. 3. AC adapter 100-240v 50 60hz universal input: Handles UK's 230V grid and global voltage variations seamlessly. 4. 12A DC power supply precision output: Maintains 12V±0.5V accuracy for sensitive electronics' longevity. 5. AC/ DC adapter 100-240v 50/60hz high efficiency: ≥85% conversion rate reduces energy waste & heat buildup. Technical Specifications Devices: Audio amplifier boards, CCTV cameras, LED strips, routers, industrial control boards Locations: Permanent indoor setups, temporary exhibitions, vehicle power extensions Certifications: UKCA, CE, RoHS compliant Scenarios: Home AV systems, office networks, retail security, DIY electronics Users: Hobbyists, IT pros, security engineers, households Extended Compatibility The 12 volt power supply design ensures broad device support, from legacy electronics to modern gadgets. As a versatile 12v power adapter, it works with Openreach fibre terminals when paired with an openreach power cable. For installations requiring extended reach, combine with our dc 12v power cable (sold separately) to achieve up to 5m total length.Engineers appreciate its switching adapter 100-240v 50 60hz technology that automatically adjusts to voltage fluctuations.
